'''Y'ull Acib''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the criminal syndicate [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. A hardened criminal and among [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] most dangerous, Acib had been serving out a prison sentence in the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|spice mines]] of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] released him and sixteen others on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to foster chaos. Going beyond the Republic's initial desires, Acib reestablished [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] on Coruscant, declaring himself [[Underlord]] and ruling over the group for a short period before being overthrown by Durga the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Y'ull Acib was a hardened criminal and had been condemned to serve out a prison sentence in the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|spice mines]] of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Meeting fellow criminal [[Fliry Vorru]] while working in the mines, both prisoners, along with fourteen others, were released by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and sent to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] following the capital planet's [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|liberation]] from the Empire.<ref name="DB" />

The Republic's strategy, developed by war hero [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], was to release the prisoners into [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]] and have them to wreak havoc for any remaining Imperials that were hiding out or trying to control parts of the city. While the plan was deemed a success, the prisoners remained free and dangerous long after the last Imperials were driven off. Working closely with his ally Fliry Vorru, the last of the line of criminal [[Underlord]]s, Acib set to work on reestablishing the power of the infamous crime syndicate [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].<ref name="CEII" />

In the wake of the Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] death, Acib succeeded in mustering the strength of the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Undercity's]] meanest criminals and Black Sun was revived. Declaring himself Underlord, the leader of Black Sun, Acib ruled with vigor and quickly amassed more and more power. In an effort to avoid [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] or treachery, Asib cloistered himself in a clandestine location, rarely appearing in person and conducting all meetings via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] communication.<ref name="CEII" />

Following the final death of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], Acib made an alliance with [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in an attempt to gain control of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The .22Council of Blood.22|Imperial Interim Ruling Council]]. To achieve this, Acib ordered the successful assassinations of Councilmen [[General/Legends|General]] [[Immodet]] and [[Xandel Carivus]]. At Grappa's urging, Acib planned to [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] Carivus and replace him, the other councilmen none the wiser. Assembling the clones on [[Ord Cantrell/Legends|Ord Cantrell]], the Imperials discovered the deception and had all of the clones executed. Discovering Black Sun's involvement, the Imperials became enraged with Black Sun and began to hunt for Acib; in turn, the Republic discovered the [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] facility which had been used, owned by [[Macus Kayniph]], and [[Battle of Smarck|destroyed]] it.<ref name="CEII" />

Believing Grappa a failure, Acib's fears were realized when the Hutt was captured by [[Zanibar]] mercenaries and taken to [[Xo]] as part of a ritual sacrifice.<ref name="CEII" /> After suffering such a devastating blow, with the Imperial's enraged and the New Republic in hot pursuit, Acib was easily overthrown in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] by [[Durga Besadii Tai|Durga]] the Hutt. Claiming the title of Underlord for himself, Durga went on to control the syndicate.<ref name="DB" />
